Sewer Cleaning | Chicago, IL

If your bungalow or flat needs Sewer Cleaning in Chicago, IL, contact Plumbers 911 to resolve your issues quickly.

Backed-up or clogged sewers aren't just an inconvenience, they can present serious health risks to your household, employees or clients. We rely on the drainage and sewerage systems to keep wastewater flowing and transport gray water and waste products to be properly treated and disposed. 

When this system goes wrong, it's vital to act quickly, and Plumbers 911 is here to help. Plumbers 911 has a vast network of experienced plumbers covering the Windy City. Whether you're looking for routine sewer cleaning in Chicago, or need more extensive repairs, we can connect you to a local plumber with the tools and expertise to solve your sewer problems. 

Every plumber in our network is fully licensed, insured and bonded and has training in the latest diagnostic tools and best practices, so you can be confident the work they do will be done right the first time. If you're faced with a sewer emergency, call Plumbers 911 at 833-PLUM-911 (833-758-6911) and we'll help you find a plumber in your local area that can clean your sewer promptly and professionally.

Why You Might Need Sewer Cleaning

Sewer lines are built to last a long time, but many were not designed to cope with the increased population density and demands of modern life. Sewers can become blocked by an accumulation of hair, cotton buds, small toys and sanitary products. Hot fats or cooking oils poured down sink drains can also contribute to problems in household drains and the sewer line itself. 

Even if you're careful about what goes down the drain, the slow accumulation of debris combined with waste from other nearby properties and the risk of damage from tree roots can all contribute to blockages. In some cases, blockages can be removed with water jetting, or minor damage can be repaired through relatively noninvasive repiping. 

Sewer cleaning uses safe methods to remove debris without damaging the pipes themselves. Plumbers 911 recommends professional sewer cleaning services because chemical drain cleaners are rarely effective and can cause damage to older pipes.

Sewer Cleaning Services in Chicago

If you're looking for sewer cleaning in Chicago, we're here to help. We have a large network of Chicago plumbers who have been carefully vetted to ensure they operate to our exacting standards. Our highly trained plumbers can also take on a variety of other tasks related to clogged drains or burst pipes, so they can handle any plumbing emergencies that come their way. 

Sewers transport waste materials containing bacteria, pathogens and noxious gasses. Because of this, it's important that any sewer work is carried out by trained professionals. If your sewers become clogged and you're noticing unpleasant smells or overflows, don't put off getting the issue fixed. 

Plumbers 911 is here to protect your household's health and safety by connecting you to reliable, professional plumbers offering sewer cleaning in Chicago. These skilled plumbers inspect your sewer and perform the necessary repairs, leaving your yard in a suitable condition if any invasive work was required.

Hire a Chicago Plumber Today

To be included in the Plumbers 911 network, each company and plumber must be fully licensed, insured and bonded. All the plumbers must pass drug tests and undergo rigorous training in the latest diagnostic techniques, tools and health and safety procedures. You can feel confident that the plumber coming to your home will deliver the highest standard of work, and the sewer will be cleaned to peak performance, freeing you from the risk of ongoing expensive maintenance. 

We expect our plumbers to undergo continuous professional development training to keep their skills current. We choose local, independent plumbers who have connections to their communities and know about common issues in the area. Our Chicago plumbers can tend to your property in a timely fashion for sewer cleaning or emergency repairs, fixing your issues and giving you peace of mind. Call Plumbers 911 at 833-PLUM-911 (833-758-6911) for all your plumbing needs.

 

Sewer Cleaning Cost in Chicago

Typical cost: $200-$600 for standard sewer line cleaning; $400-$1,000 with camera inspection included. We provide with transparent upfront pricing. Call 833-758-6911 for a quote.

Frequently Asked Questions

How often should sewer lines be cleaned?

For most Chicago homes, we recommend sewer cleaning every 1-2 years as preventive maintenance. Homes with large trees near the sewer line or older clay pipes may need annual cleaning.

What's the difference between sewer cleaning and sewer replacement?

Sewer cleaning removes blockages and buildup from an otherwise intact pipe. Sewer replacement is needed when pipes are cracked, collapsed, or structurally compromised. A camera inspection after cleaning helps determine if replacement is needed.
